based_on: Byte-precise mutation of fixtures/external/pytorch.softmax-ce.batched.golden.jsonl. v0.9 batched observer-mode adversarial plate — each fixture surfaces a distinct batched attack class with a deterministic mutation.

mutation.note: Canonical mean-vs-sum confusion. reduction declared as "mean" but loss.total emitted as sum(per_sample) (off by factor of N=4). Rule 18 catches this structurally without engine recompute.

reconciliation_check_targeted_first: Rule 18: Batch reduction consistency violation — loss.total claims reduction='mean' but value equals sum(loss.per_sample.values()).
purpose: v0.9 batched observer-mode anti-circularity fixture. Pressure-tests that the named rule fires BEFORE the reconciler consults fixture_status metadata.
v0_9_note: v0.9 ships batched SGD softmax+CE observer-mode ingestion. Rule 18 (batch reduction consistency) and Rule 19 (sample-set coherence) are new gated rules. Adam / AdamW / momentum and per-sample gradients deferred to v0.9.x.
